stemHtml:
Complete the following sentence:
The Secondary Surveillance Radar (SSR) mode S is compatible with (1)__ but also provides the information to (2)__.

options.a: (1) Airborne Weather Radar (AWR); (2) the Traffic alert and Collision Avoidance System (TCAS).
options.b: (1) SSR modes A and C; (2) Automatic Dependent Surveillance - Broadcast (ADS-B).
options.c: (1) Distance Measuring Equipment (DME); (2) enhanced vertical tracking.
options.d: (1) the radio altimeter; (2) SSR mode C.
